verses.text: 'Let not your heart be troubled'; in My Father's house are many mansions; I go to prepare a place. Sure comfort. Christ goes ahead to ready a home for His own.
'Let not your heart be troubled'; in My Father's house are many mansions; I go to prepare a place. Sure comfort. Christ goes ahead to ready a home for His own.
'Let not your heart be troubled'; in My Father's house are many mansions; I go to prepare a place. Sure comfort. Christ goes ahead to ready a home for His own.
'I am the way, the truth, and the life: no man cometh unto the Father, but by me.' The only way. Christ alone leads us to God.
'I am the way, the truth, and the life: no man cometh unto the Father, but by me.' The only way. Christ alone leads us to God.
'I am the way, the truth, and the life: no man cometh unto the Father, but by me.' The only way. Christ alone leads us to God.
'He that hath seen me hath seen the Father.' God revealed. To know Christ is to know the Father.
'He that hath seen me hath seen the Father.' God revealed. To know Christ is to know the Father.
'He that hath seen me hath seen the Father.' God revealed. To know Christ is to know the Father.
The words and works are the Father's; believe Me, or believe for the works' sake. Witness of works. His deeds testify to His union with God.
The words and works are the Father's; believe Me, or believe for the works' sake. Witness of works. His deeds testify to His union with God.
The believer shall do greater works; 'whatsoever ye shall ask in my name... I will do.' Prayer in His name. Christ answers the prayers offered in His name.
The believer shall do greater works; 'whatsoever ye shall ask in my name... I will do.' Prayer in His name. Christ answers the prayers offered in His name.
The believer shall do greater works; 'whatsoever ye shall ask in my name... I will do.' Prayer in His name. Christ answers the prayers offered in His name.
'If ye love me, keep my commandments'; I will send 'another Comforter,' the Spirit of truth. Promised Spirit. Love obeys, and God gives His abiding Spirit.
'If ye love me, keep my commandments'; I will send 'another Comforter,' the Spirit of truth. Promised Spirit. Love obeys, and God gives His abiding Spirit.
'If ye love me, keep my commandments'; I will send 'another Comforter,' the Spirit of truth. Promised Spirit. Love obeys, and God gives His abiding Spirit.
'I will not leave you comfortless'; 'because I live, ye shall live also.' Living union. His life is the pledge of theirs.
'I will not leave you comfortless'; 'because I live, ye shall live also.' Living union. His life is the pledge of theirs.
'I will not leave you comfortless'; 'because I live, ye shall live also.' Living union. His life is the pledge of theirs.
He that keeps My commandments loves Me; 'we will come unto him, and make our abode with him.' Indwelling. God dwells with the loving and obedient.
He that keeps My commandments loves Me; 'we will come unto him, and make our abode with him.' Indwelling. God dwells with the loving and obedient.
He that keeps My commandments loves Me; 'we will come unto him, and make our abode with him.' Indwelling. God dwells with the loving and obedient.
He that keeps My commandments loves Me; 'we will come unto him, and make our abode with him.' Indwelling. God dwells with the loving and obedient.
The Comforter shall teach all things; 'Peace I leave with you, my peace I give unto you.' Lasting peace. Christ's peace is unlike the world's.
The Comforter shall teach all things; 'Peace I leave with you, my peace I give unto you.' Lasting peace. Christ's peace is unlike the world's.
The Comforter shall teach all things; 'Peace I leave with you, my peace I give unto you.' Lasting peace. Christ's peace is unlike the world's.
If ye loved Me, ye would rejoice I go to the Father; 'the prince of this world... hath nothing in me.' Sinless Lord. Satan finds no foothold in Him.
